children.label: a
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to accomplish the purposes of this subchapter, but not to exceed $1,500,000 for the purchase of lands and interests in lands and not to exceed $3,500,000 for the construction and improvements.
from the Land and Water Conservation Fund (established under the Land and Water Conservation Fund Act of 1965) not to exceed $5,000,000, and1See References in Text note below.1

from any other sources an amount not to exceed the sum of (A) $5,000,000, and (B) an amount equal to the amount deposited in the Treasury under after ,section 460y–4(3)(B) of this titleAugust 20, 1978
